content.text:
[cron:74870ca0-3164-4c7a-ac43-02cac1b4034e Godot下载监控] 检查 Godot 下载状态。如果未安装成功，继续尝试下载 Godot 4.x Linux 版本。使用 wget 或 curl 从官网或镜像下载，每10分钟重试直到成功。下载成功后解压到 /tmp/ 并验证可执行。
Current time: Sunday, March 1st, 2026 — 7:39 PM (Asia/Shanghai)

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

arguments.command: ls -la /tmp/godot* 2>/dev/null || echo "No Godot files found in /tmp"
which godot 2>/dev/null || echo "Godot not in PATH"
